description: Collaborator testimonials with attribution, tags, and full quotes. Each row links to a deeper JSON payload. Fetch json_url for the index.

testimonials.name: Amy Schweiss
testimonials.summary: As a Product Manager, I was impressed by Kyle's quick grasp of our business needs and his unique ability to manage both the long-term vision and the intricate details of our database structure... he consistently demonstrated a deep understanding of our business objectives and adeptly worked within our technical constraints without sacrificing user value.
testimonials.title: Senior Product Operations Manager

testimonials.name: Arun Thakur
testimonials.summary: Kyle played a key role in filling gaps between business and development team. With his leadership, his team always creatively and successfully delivered what we needed as a dev team. He was always open to listen and consider new ideas - I've never seen him decline to hear any suggestion from the dev team. He believes in quality work and was always committed to fulfilling his team's deadlines. It was a great learning experience working with him.
testimonials.title: Full Stack Software Engineer

testimonials.name: Ashley Taylor
testimonials.summary: Kyle has a vast array of experience, and is clearly driven by curiosity on how to improve interactions between users of tech products and their creators.
testimonials.title: CEO

testimonials.name: Chaitalee Deokar
testimonials.summary: He quickly got up to speed on complex treasury and finance landscape + understanding customer needs and asked thoughtful questions that impacted the final product in very meaningful ways
testimonials.title: Treasury Services Payments Product Manager VP

testimonials.name: Charla Kunkel
testimonials.summary: Kyle is highly adaptable and... works across multiple tracks collaborating with different stakeholders, balanc[ing] innovative design with the flexibility to adapt to changing requirements—a must in our fast-paced startup.
testimonials.title: VP of Engineering and Product

testimonials.name: Francis Beavers
testimonials.relationship: Interviewer for project where I was a subject matter expert.
testimonials.summary: Kyle was an amazing thought partner for our team when we were were in earlier exploratory stage of designing. He was able to illustrate what designing financially inclusive product looked like through past projects. He also shared his …
testimonials.title: Design Researcher

testimonials.name: John Dubuque
testimonials.summary: Kyle has been a key team member in helping us achieve our vision. He is very adaptable. Startups like ours need people who can pivot very quickly to the business' changing direction or needs. Kyle quickly transitions between strategic and tactical work which has been key to our success. He's helped ground our ideas (good and bad!) in the customer's needs and practices
testimonials.title: CEO

testimonials.name: John Lees
testimonials.summary: Kyle is an incredible resource.  I hired him to help us fix a badly broken UX/UI model and what I got was excellent App product strategy, consumer needs understanding, UX/UI definitions, engineer project and task management and delivery of an outstanding result.
testimonials.title: Vice President Rocket Innovations

testimonials.name: Julia Zhu
testimonials.summary:
I had the pleasure of working with Kyle for a year on various projects ranging from concepting to detail wireframing. I was impressed by his ability to quickly adapt to new subjects and move swiftly from chaos to design solutions.

And one …
testimonials.title: Interaction Designer

testimonials.name: Katherine Paseman
testimonials.summary:
If you ever have the opportunity to work with Kyle — take it. You’ll learn more than you ever though possible and produce some of the best work of your life. 

I worked with Kyle in two capacities. 

First, Kyle was the research lead on two …
testimonials.title: Researcher

testimonials.name: Lawrence Lipkin
testimonials.summary: I would highly recommend working with Kyle if you get the chance! He is naturally curious, able to learn complex domains quickly, and uses his superb story-telling skills to re-shape and re-frame business ideas into cohesive narratives that enable cross-functional teams to collaborate more effectively.
testimonials.title: Executive Director, Design, Corporate & Investment Bank Platform Services

testimonials.name: Lindsey Mosby
testimonials.summary: I had the pleasure of working with Kyle during his tenure at frog. While his title might have been Interaction Designer, his skills were much wider and more nuanced that just that. A gifted field interviewer, polished illustrator, storyteller and curious creative. Sees like a designer, thinks like a strategist. An excellent future-forward combo!
testimonials.title: Vice President, Strategy

testimonials.name: Madegwa Mmbono
testimonials.organization: (a research consultancy project for Big Tech Company)
testimonials.summary: I had the pleasure of working with Kyle on a design research project in Nairobi for an international client to understand people's personal finances, and he is a talented UX researcher with a wealth of knowledge and experience.
testimonials.title: Design Researcher

testimonials.name: Mark Flaming
testimonials.summary: Kyle is also an exceptional leader who inspires and coaches his colleagues. Kyle built an entire UX/UI practice from the ground up as part of our ambitious effort to design, build and market a mass market digital retail banking platform in Myanmar. He was invaluable as a designer, leader, and intellectual partner. I look forward to working with him again!
testimonials.title: Chief Digital Officer

testimonials.name: Mike Mya Tha
testimonials.summary: Kyle is a great UX lead whom I had a chance to work together at Yoma bank. As we are going through digital transformation, his proficiency at telling the visual story brings everyone on the same page and makes it easier to solve problems as …
testimonials.title: Senior UX Designer

testimonials.name: Moh Moh Khine
testimonials.summary: Kyle is an inspiration every team needs. I had the great pleasure of working with him on multiple projects at Yoma Bank while the bank underwent its digital transformation. Kyle's expertise in design research, user experience, and design …
testimonials.title: Business Analyst

testimonials.name: Sara Yang
testimonials.organization: (a research consultancy project for Big Tech Company)
testimonials.summary: He pushes for excellence and insight, ensuring that research endeavors result in not just reports, but perspective; and that design processes move from insights into directive opportunities.
testimonials.title: Design Research Lead

testimonials.name: Sheldon Trotman
testimonials.summary: Kyle was not just a contributor but a true strategic partner. Unlike many specialists, Kyle's versatility shone through his ability to seamlessly navigate these areas, proving invaluable during our product's early development process.
testimonials.title: CEO

testimonials.name: Soe Hla Win
testimonials.summary: Kyle, as the lead UX designer, acquired and developed in-house UX talent which is integral towards creating best of breed customer experience design on retail mobile banking app. He worked hand-in-hand with technical development team to …
testimonials.title: Head of Technology Transformation

testimonials.name: Steven Aung Soe Min
testimonials.summary:
Kyle is one of the coolest guys I have met in my professional life.
  I have witnessed and am not hesitant to endorse several of his abilities: To create amazing designs and interfaces, to visualize complex concepts and ideas into …
testimonials.title: Business Manager and Credit Analyist, Digital Lending

testimonials.name: Theresa Neil
testimonials.summary: I've engaged Kyle as a consultant at Guidea Design to support our clients in the early stages of product ideation and definition. His skills as a researcher, strategist, and designer and his high level of client-facing professionalism make it easy for us to call on him when we need more support in these areas.
testimonials.title: CEO

testimonials.name: Tricia Wang
testimonials.summary: Kyle's ability to quickly ramp up on complex topics in Web3 and cryptocurrency enabled him to fluently build rapport with industry participants in ways that revealed the human stories underneath. In synthesis, he is able to work at multiple levels of depth with a topic to understand implications from the the minute level of individual experience to the broader systemic ways trends affect communities, industries and societies.
testimonials.title: Executive Director

testimonials.name: Wendy Wang
testimonials.summary: I worked with Kyle on an interesting project. When we cooperated, he was always full of passion and creativity. We could talk for hours about how to display information on maps, and he always gave great advice. I was lucky to work with him. …
testimonials.title: Senior Product Manager
